§6.3.5.9.3 Relating PP Records to PC Records — Example 4
§6.3.5.9.3 Relating PP Records to PC Records
verbatim: Note that an attempt has been made to approximate real pharmacokinetic data; however, the example values are not intended to reflect data used for actual analysis. When certain time-point concentrations have been omitted from PP calculations in Examples 2-4, the actual parameter values in the PP dataset have not been recalculated from those in Example 1 to reflect those omissions.
The SDTMIG includes several domains for physiology and morphology findings for different body systems. These differ only in body system, in domain code, and in informative content such as examples.

| --SEQ | Sequence Number | Num | | Identifier | Sequence number to ensure uniqueness of records within a dataset for a subject (or within a parameter, in the case of the Trial Summary dataset). May be any valid number (including decimals) and does not have to start at 1. | Req |
| CVSTRESU | Standard Units | Char | (UNIT) | Variable Qualifier | Standardized units used for CVSTRESC and CVSTRESN. | Perm |

1. The Cardiovascular System Findings domain is used to represent results and findings of cardiovascular diagnostic procedures. Information about the conduct of the procedure(s), if collected, is submitted in the Procedures (PR) domain.
